schools.title: Cambridge ELLIS Unit Summer School on Probabilistic Machine Learning
schools.description: Five-day summer school on probabilistic ML, covering advanced probabilistic models, generative models, causality, and accelerating science, with lectures and panel discussions; school expected to take place July 2026 at University of Cambridge.

schools.title: Machine Learning Summer School on Reliability & Safety
schools.description: Five-day summer school on AI safety, reliability, and robustness of ML systems, with invited lectures from leading researchers and a poster session; school expected to take place June - July 2026 at Jagiellonian University, Kraków.

schools.title: 9th Advanced Course on Data Science & Machine Learning – ACDL 2026, from AI Agents to Agentic AI
schools.description: Five-day full-immersion course on AI agents, agentic AI, deep learning, data science, and generative AI, with lectures delivered by world-renowned experts; school expected to take place June 2026 in Castiglione della Pescaia, Tuscany, Italy.

schools.title: Machine Learning for Molecules 2026
schools.description: Summer school on ML for molecular and materials science: property prediction, ML potentials, graph neural networks, self-driving labs, and generative/LLM-based synthesis prediction, with lectures, tutorials, and poster session; school expected to take place September 2026 at Karlsruhe Institute of Technology (KIT).

schools.title: ProbAI School 2026
schools.description: School in probabilistic machine learning, covering probabilistic modeling, variational inference, deep generative models, latent variable methods, normalizing flows, neural ODEs, and probabilistic programming; school expected to take place August 2026 in Vilnius, Lithuania.
